---
name: Compatibility report
about: Report mod compatibility or incompatibility
title: '[Compatibility]: '
labels: compatibility
assignees: ''
---

## Before submitting

Please attach your `LogOutput.log` file. Compatibility reports without logs may be closed because mod conflicts cannot be diagnosed reliably without logs.

You can usually find it here:

```text
BepInEx/LogOutput.log
```

If this is a multiplayer-specific issue, please provide logs from the host and the affected clients.

## AdvancedCompanyUnofficial version

Example: `1.0.2`

## Lethal Company version

Example: `v80`

## Mod being reported

Please state the mod name and version that is compatible or incompatible.

## Compatibility status

Choose one:

- [ ] Compatible
- [ ] Incompatible
- [ ] Partially compatible
- [ ] Unknown / needs investigation

## What happened?

Describe the compatibility issue or confirmed working behavior.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Install AdvancedCompanyUnofficial and the reported mod.
2. Start the game.
3. ...

## LogOutput.log

Attach `BepInEx/LogOutput.log` here, or paste the relevant error section.

## Full mod list or profile code

Please provide your full mod list, dependency strings, or exported profile code.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have attached or pasted my `LogOutput.log`.
- [ ] I have included the AdvancedCompanyUnofficial version.
- [ ] I have included the other mod name and version.
- [ ] I have listed my mod list or profile code.
